questions: Baseball e koto jon player thake?
answers: Baseball is America's pastime — a bat-and-ball sport played between two teams of 9 players. One team bats while the other pitches and fields. A game has 9 innings, and the team with the most runs wins.
Baseball e batter pitcher er ball hit kore ar bases ghure run score kore. 3 strikes e batter out, 4 balls e batter walk paye. Each inning e prottek team bat kore until 3 outs hoy.

MLB (Major League Baseball) is the top professional baseball league with 30 teams. Legendary players include Babe Ruth, Jackie Robinson, Hank Aaron, and modern stars like Mike Trout and Shohei Ohtani.

Baseball requires a combination of pitching, hitting, fielding, and base running skills. The World Series is the championship of MLB, held every October, and it's one of the oldest sporting events in North America.

feelings.question: baseball rules ki?
feelings.answer: The baseball rules are straightforward — serve below the waist, keep the shirtcocks in bounds, and score 21 points to win a game. Matches are best of seven innings with two-out rallies allowed.
